jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Zostel
jsonLd.description:
Zostel invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!
